prompt: Execute Phase A for: Implement real-time notifications via WebSocket. Generate execution plan with step status.

assertions.name: has_execution_plan
assertions.description: Should output an execution plan structure

assertions.name: includes_step_status
assertions.description: Each step should show its status (pending/completed/skipped)

assertions.name: lists_all_three_steps
assertions.description: Output must reference all three phase steps A.1, A.2, A.3
